scripts.deploy:staging: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=staging react-router build && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=production react-router build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:staging:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:staging:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:production:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production
